reviews.comment:
Las estación de servicio YPF está algo desactualizada, quedó chica para el caudal de gente que transita el ida y vuelta a la patagonia (uno de los principales caminos desde BA provincia). Pocos surtidores, baños chiquitos, lugar para estacionar de...sí, 5 o 6 autos!!?**"% nada! deberían remodelarla.
La atención de los muchachos playeros y de las chicas en el shop es muy buena. El hotel (que no utilicé) parece muy fachero.
Hay lugar para parar al aire libre si el clima lo permite.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF gas station is somewhat outdated, too small for the flow of people traveling to and from Patagonia (one of the main routes from Buenos Aires province). Few pumps, small bathrooms, and parking for...yes, 5 or 6 cars!!?**"% nothing! They should remodel it.
The service from the beach boys and the girls at the shop is very good. The hotel (which I didn't use) seems very nice.
There's a place to stop outdoors if the weather permits.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5d0plMnZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
EL 29 DE ENERO ESTUVE AHÍ. PANDEMIA. EL RESTARURANTE SOLO TENÍA UN ESPACIO INTERIOR REDUCIDO LLENO DE GENTE. ESTABA PROHIBIDO COMER ALGO EN EL ENORME PARQUE QUE TIENE. ???????

(Translated by Google)
I was there on January 29th. Pandemic. The restaurant only had a small, packed indoor space. Eating in the huge park was prohibited.

reviews.comment:
Es la estación de servicio YPF del automóvil club argentino que se encuentra en la av. Circunvalación de bahía Blanca, cuenta con restaurante y alojamiento muy completo

(Translated by Google)
It is the YPF service station of the Argentine Automobile Club located on the Circunvalación Avenue in Bahía Blanca, it has a restaurant and very complete accommodation
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5azlPYlZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente posta para descansar y recargar combustible de ida o vuelta al sur evitando el tránsito del centro de Bahia Blanca.
Tiene un parque atrás con algunos árboles para tirarse en el suelo y unas mesas de cemento para comer algo afuera si te lo permite el clima. Los tostados y las empanadas son deliciosas y a un precio acorde.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent place to rest and refuel on the way to or from the south, avoiding the traffic in downtown Bahia Blanca.
There's a park in the back with some trees to relax under and some cement tables to eat outside if the weather permits. The toasted sandwiches and empanadas are delicious and reasonably priced.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N2NpeGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
OJO! Ofrecen descuento por pago en efectivo, pero no es así: te descuentan 10 % por no emitir factura (eso es evasión....)
Protocolo COVID inexistente. El desayunador con las ventanas herméticamente cerradas. Suspender de alcohol, sin alcohol

Queda cómodo porque está sobre la ruta y se evita entrar al centro, pero muy desactualizados...

(Translated by Google)
BE CAREFUL! They offer a discount for cash payments, but that's not the case: they deduct 10% for not issuing an invoice (that's evasion...)
No COVID protocol. The breakfast room has tightly closed windows. Discontinue alcohol, no alcohol.

It's convenient because it's on the route and you avoid entering the center, but it's very outdated...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MWRQUmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El protocolo covid PÉSIMO, estábamos desayunando las mesas bastante pegadas unas con otras, quedaban 3 mesas vacías (una de 4, y 2 de 2) y la chica hizo entrar a un grupo de 13 personas, todos amontonados, donde los iba a sentar? Arriba de la mesa, no se. La chica que nos atendía tenía un barbijo que no le cubría completamente, y nos agarraba las facturas CON LA MANO.
UN DESASTRE.

(Translated by Google)
The COVID protocol was TERRIBLE. We were having breakfast, the tables were quite close together, there were only 3 empty tables (one for 4, and two for 2), and the waitress let in a group of 13 people, all crammed together. Where was she going to seat them? On top of the table, I don't know. The waitress who served us had a mask that didn't cover her completely, and she was handling our pastries WITH HER HAND. A DISASTER.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eWV1Z1dREAE
